title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Cancel
scenario: After onboarding, when the user denies location sharing and then accesses Lens App Settings > Find My Device, a location permission popup appears; tapping "Cancel" returns to the Poly Lens Menu.
steps: 2. When the Location Sharing dialogue appears, select "Don't Allow".
4. Navigate to App Settings > Find My Device.
5. Observe the permission popup for location usage with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options, with the FMD screen visible in the background.
expected: Navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu.
